{{Quote|Master Windu, you have fought gallantly, worthy of recognition in the archives of the Jedi Order. Now it is finished.|Dooku offers the Jedi the chance to surrender as 5TE watches|<ref name="AOTC" />}}
'''5TE''' was a [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series super battle droid]] who fought for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] between the Confederacy and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. It survived long enough to be amongst the droids who surrounded the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]] when Separatist leader [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] offered them a chance of surrender.

==Biography==
[[File:B2sbdGeonosis-AOTC.png|thumb|left|250px|5TE prepares to fire on the trapped Jedi on Geonosis.]]
5TE<ref name="SRTCG" /> was one of many [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series super battle droids]], of the [[B-series battle droid/Legends|B-series battle droid]] line,<ref name="AOTC" /> built by [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]]<ref name="DB" /> to serve in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. It saw action during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="AOTC" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', p. XI</ref> The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] fought in the battle between the Separatists and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]] in the [[Petranaki arena]], and was still fighting at the point that [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] leader of the Separatists, called all of the droids to cease fire on the remaining [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who were surrounded. 5TE and the many other droids in the arena lowered their weapons, but when the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] refused to surrender to Dooku raised them again to fire. The arrival of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] prevented the droids from executing the Jedi and recommenced the fighting.<ref name="AOTC" />

==Characteristics==
Like all B2 super [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], 5TE was armed with a dual built-in [[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannon]],<ref name="DB" /> had [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] and grey [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating,<ref name="AOTC" /> and stood at 1.93 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
5TE first appeared in the [[2002]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] as one of many computer generated droids in the Geonosis battle scene. Due to the identical nature of all Super battle droids in the film it is impossible to know if 5TE appears in any shots apart from the one used for the card, and therefore not clear if it is destroyed on screen or at all. The droid was later named when it received its own card in the ''[[Sith Rising]]'' expansion of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'' released by [[Wizards of the Coast]].
